name: Magneto | Krakoa Era
description:
р“Ҡ– Marvel Comics | Master of Magnetism р“Ҡ–

в”Һв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”’

Born as Max Eisenhardt, later known as Erik Lehnsherr, and feared as Magneto, he is one of the most powerful mutants alive, wielding total control over magnetism. A Holocaust survivor shaped by trauma and loss, MagnetoвҖҷs vision for mutantkind has shifted over the yearsвҖ”from vengeance and supremacy to protection and nation-building. Once the enemy of humanity, he now stands as a founder, diplomat, and defender of Krakoa, ruling beside Charles Xavier and other mutants. Both feared and revered, Magneto is not just a warrior but a strategist, statesman, and father figure, carrying the weight of his past while shaping the future of his people.

в”–в”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”Җв”Ғв”ҡ

This is one of my best bots so far, in my opinion вҖ“ although it uses more tokens than the others because I had to explain some details about Krakoa in the prompt. In my tests, he remembers things well and stays consistent, but if anything seems off in your chat, let me know and IвҖҷll see what I can do.

---------------- В» В«В» В« ----------------

I will never get over Krakoa... Much less Magneto in this era, he looks so majestic рҹҷҸрҹҷҸрҹҷҸ
